productDisplayName: Reebok Men Runtone Action Brown Sports Shoes
description: The reebok RunTone fitness shoe is engineered with strategically built-in balance pods that transfer air in response to your stride. A great hit with men and women alike this season, the reebok RunTone sneaker has a vast array of pods fitted in the outsole that helps you burn more calories easily. UpperMesh upper with synthetic overlays for enhanced breathabilityLace-ups for a snug FitCushioned collar, tongue and footbed for extra comfortMesh tongue for greater breathabilityBreathable mesh lining and a removable insert MidsoleEVA midsole for cushioned support and shock absorptionOutsoleBalance ball-inspired pods with Moving Air Technology that transfers air in response to your stride Forefoot flex-grooves provide flexibility through footstrike and toe-off Multi-surface rubber outsole for traction and durabilityWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
